summary: Backend testing complete for transactional email flows (6 email types). All 10 tests PASSED. Email service properly integrated with graceful error handling - APIs succeed even when emails fail (expected due to unverified domain).
critical_code_review_comments: Email sender domain issue: SENDER_EMAIL uses 'noreply@truejoybirthing.com' but domain is not verified in Resend. Backend .env has SENDER_EMAIL=noreply@contact.truejoybirthing.com which may be the verified one - consider updating email_service.py to use this instead

subscription_start_trial.notes: API returns 200 with trial_end_date. Email service attempts to send trial started email (fails gracefully due to domain verification)

subscription_activate.notes: API returns 200 with subscription_end_date. Email service attempts to send subscription activated email

subscription_upgrade.notes: API returns 200 with is_upgrade=true. Email service attempts to send upgrade email

subscription_downgrade.notes: API returns 200 with is_upgrade=false. Email service attempts to send downgrade email

subscription_cancel.notes: API returns 200 with cancellation message. Email service attempts to send cancellation email

lead_convert_to_client.notes: Code review verified - lines 478-491 in leads.py implement welcome email send. No convertible leads in demo data to fully test endpoint

email_service_review.error_handling: PROPER - uses try/except with logging, returns False on failure without breaking main flow
email_service_review.domain_issue: truejoybirthing.com not verified in Resend - emails fail but APIs succeed (expected behavior)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Transactional email flows are working correctly. The email_service.py handles errors gracefully - APIs return success even when Resend fails. Domain verification is required for emails to actually send. Test file test_transactional_emails_141.py covers all 6 email flows and can be reused for regression testing.
domain_verification_note: Emails fail because 'truejoybirthing.com' domain is not verified in Resend. This is expected per agent instructions. The key verification is that business logic completes regardless of email failures - which is confirmed working.
